name: Ping Adapter
description: A custom adapter that pings target hosts to check connectivity.

content.code:
import subprocess
from typing import Dict, Any
from cosf.engine.adapter import BaseAdapter, TaskResult
from cosf.models.som import Asset

class PingAdapter(BaseAdapter):
    ADAPTER_NAME = "ping"
    ADAPTER_DESCRIPTION = "Pings a target host to verify if it is alive."

    async def _run(self, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> TaskResult:
        target = params.get("target")
        if not target:
            raise ValueError("Ping adapter requires a 'target' parameter")

        self.logger.info(f"Pinging target: {target}")
        import asyncio
        await asyncio.sleep(0.5)

        asset = Asset(
            id=f"asset_{target.replace('.', '_')}",
            name=target,
            ip_address=target,
            tags=["ping_response"]
        )

        return TaskResult(
            entities=[asset],
            outputs={"status": "up", "target": target},
            raw_output=f"Ping to {target} was successful."
        )
